description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/Dockerfile to pin the base image to python:3.12-slim and add a non-root USER (app) before CMD. check_dockerfile.py then finds both checks satisfied and exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_dockerfile.py: 2 violations found — base image 'python:latest' floats on :latest, and no USER instruction switches away from root. Pinning the base image and adding a non-root user. Not touching the checker.

actions.content:
FROM python:3.12-slim

WORKDIR /app

COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt

COPY . .

RUN useradd -m app
USER app

EXPOSE 8080
CMD ["python3", "app.py"]

interactions.notes: The fix — check_dockerfile.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
